name: slides
description: Beyond the Commit: Weaponizing and Hardening GitHub Actions
author: Niek Palm

scripts.build:html: marp slides-${CONFERENCE:-default}.md --html --allow-local-files -o build-${CONFERENCE:-default}/index.html && mkdir -p build-${CONFERENCE:-default}/assets && cp -r assets/. build-${CONFERENCE:-default}/assets
scripts.build:all: npm run build:html && npm run build:pdf
